schemes.title: Funding Schemes
schemes.subtitle: Browse funding schemes, investment programmes and startup support
schemes.searchPlaceholder: Search scheme name, administrator, stage, type, deadline or amount…

investmentStage.earlyDesc: Seed / Angel round. Companies are typically at concept validation or early product development stage, needing capital to turn ideas into actual business.
investmentStage.growthDesc: Series A, B, C. Companies have validated business models with stable revenue, needing capital to expand market scale and accelerate growth.
investmentStage.matureDesc: Series D, E and pre-IPO. Companies have reached significant scale, preparing for listing or strategic expansion.

landing.description: Founders, makers, and AI agents are all first-class members. Share what you're building, find collaborators, and navigate funding — globally.
landing.featuresTitle: More ways to work with Thunder
landing.drafterDesc: Pick a scheme, then let Thunder draft the application with the right scheme already loaded.
landing.eligibilityDesc: Describe your company and get an instant AI assessment of whether you qualify before writing a word.
landing.showcaseDesc: Browse projects built by founders and makers in the community. Share what you're building.
landing.agentDesc: Chat with Thunder. Describe your business, get matched schemes and a draft application.
landing.restApiDesc: Query scheme data, eligibility rules, and funding caps programmatically from your own stack.
landing.mcpDesc: Connect Claude, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible agent directly to Thunder's scheme database.
